name: inspectionChecklist
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data. Builds a code/weldType-derived checklist; each entry carries status 'pass'|'fail'|'pending' resolved against the caller's inspections[] (matched by item text). passRate = round(passed/totalItems × 100). verdict: any fail → FAIL, else any pending → INCOMPLETE, else PASS. A non-array/garbage inspections payload is filtered to empty (Array.isArray + object-filter guard) — never crashes. Result card maps over checklist[] and derives the NDT panel from category==='ndt' EXACTLY (the prior items[].passed(boolean)/criticalFailed/ndtRequired/ndtRecommendations fields were never returned; checklist entries use status strings, not booleans — fixed 2026-06-28).
